pages.text:
Communalty of Australia.

WHEREAS the Governmenta of the United Kingdom

of

Great Britain and Northern Ireland, Canada, Australia, Nev

Zealand, the Union of south Africa, India and Paklatan on the one hand and the Government of the Republie of France on the other hand, desire to conclude a far Graves Agreement;

HOW THEREFORE THESE PRESENTS ARE TO CERTIFY thet

FRANK KEITH OFFICER, One of His Majesty's Knights-Bachelos,

Officer of the Most Excellent Order of the British Empire, upon whom has been conferred the decoration of the Military

Cross, has been duly named, constituted and appointed by the

Government of the Commonnealth of Australla to act as Its

Plenipotentiary and Representative, having full power and authority to gign the said Agreement on Its behalf.

IN WITNESS WHEREOR I, RICHARD GARDINER CASEY,

Minister of State for External Affairs of the Commonwealth of Australla have hereunder set my hand and seal.

Dons at canberra this twenty. enghed day of

September, one thousand nine hundred and fifty-one.

7

Minister of State for External Affalro,

Pouvoirs de négociation et de signature du Royaume-Uni
